session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8944 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.

session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-07 17:30:46 PT

Found 2 issues across 2 files. 1 inline comment posted.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
❌ Inaccurate claims — Found in `docs/learned/cli/plan-implement.md:169`
✅ Verbatim source code (in diff) — None found in diff lines
⚠️ Verbatim source code (pre-existing) — Found in `docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md:381` (not in PR diff, cannot post inline)

### Doc Verdicts

| File | Verdict | Duplicative % | High Value % | Issues |
|------|---------|---------------|-------------|--------|
| `docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md` | SIMPLIFY | 15% | 70% | 1 verbatim (pre-existing, not in diff) |
| `docs/learned/cli/erk-exec-commands.md` | KEEP | 10% | 75% | 0 in PR changes |
| `docs/learned/cli/plan-implement.md` | SIMPLIFY | 10% | 75% | 1 inaccurate claim |
| `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md` | KEEP | 5% | 80% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md` | KEEP | 0% | 90% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/erk/index.md` | KEEP | 0% | 85% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/erk/issue-pr-linkage-storage.md` | KEEP | 10% | 75% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/erk/pr-address-workflows.md` | KEEP | 10% | 75% | 0 |
| `docs/learned/erk/remote-workflow-template.md` | KEEP | 20% | 65% | 0 in PR changes |

### Violations Summary

- `docs/learned/cli/plan-implement.md:169`: Terminology inconsistency — "Plans live in GitHub issues" contradicts PR's issue→plan rename. Inline comment posted.
- `docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md:381`: Pre-existing verbatim erk source code (`from erk.cli.commands.wt.create_cmd import create_wt` / `wt_group.add_command(create_wt)`). Source: `src/erk/cli/commands/wt/__init__.py:8,25`. Not in PR diff — flagged for awareness only.

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md`: 1 pre-existing issue (not in diff)
- `docs/learned/cli/erk-exec-commands.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/plan-implement.md`: 1 violation (inline comment posted)
- `docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/tripwires.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/erk/index.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/erk/issue-pr-linkage-storage.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/erk/pr-address-workflows.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/erk/remote-workflow-template.md`: 0 violations

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-07 17:30:46 PT**: Audited 9 docs. Found 1 inaccurate claim (`plan-implement.md:169` — missed "issue" → "plan" rename). 1 pre-existing verbatim block in `command-organization.md:381` (not in diff). 1 inline comment posted.
